title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LIBOTON STREET IN THE CITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR TO M.T. VILLANUEVA AVENUE

chunks.text:
H. No. 5390; 105 OG No. 42, 6224 (October 19, 2009); Manila Standard Today, December 22, 2009; Manila Times, August 28, 2009

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9704, August 07, 2009 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LIBOTON STREET IN THE CITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR TO M.T. VILLANUEVA AVENUE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Department of Libton Street in the CIty of Naga, Province of Camarines Sur shall hereinafter be known as M.T. Villanueva Avenue.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 3, 2008 and May 25, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARAUA-YAP

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

APPROVED: Aug. 07, 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
